Name: DAMAGE_WEAPON_TYPE_PARAM
Description: Defines damage multipliers based on target weapon/body material type, adjusting effectiveness depending on physical composition and entity class.

Fields.Name: Spirit: Damage %
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied against ethereal or phantom entities.

Fields.Name: Flesh: Damage %
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied against soft organic materials such as flesh or cloth.

Fields.Name: Hard: Damage %
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied against moderately tough materials.

Fields.Name: Very Hard: Damage %
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied against highly durable materials such as stone or metal.

Fields.Name: Giant: Damage %
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied against large-scale entities such as giants or demonic beings.
